---
title: "Spatial IV Experimental Models"
format: gfm
execute:
  echo: true
  output: true
  warning: true
  message: true
---

```{r setup}
helper <- if (file.exists("analysis/_analysis_helpers.R")) "analysis/_analysis_helpers.R" else "../_analysis_helpers.R"
source(helper)
```

## Legacy diagnostic intent

This exploratory landing page keeps the legacy `eval = FALSE` spatial-IV model attempts in `analysis/`, while the benchmark notebook gives the fuller diagnostic summary.  The current result is target-backed and should be refreshed with `make benchmarking`.

```{r spatial-iv-exploratory-status}
spatial_iv_status <- analysis_target_csv("bench_spatial_iv_experimental", "spatial_iv_model_status.csv")
analysis_table(spatial_iv_status, "Spatial-IV model status")
```
